sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24585" key="dia/bregma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διά-βρεγμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n24585.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">extract prepared by maceration,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dieuch.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:4:7:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.7.11</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
